title: Fix ERD Node Positioning Not Persisting After Navigation
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want my saved ERD node positions to persist when I navigate away and return, so that I don't lose my custom layout.
description:
## Bug
After repositioning ERD nodes in a saved view and navigating away, returning to the view showed nodes in different positions than where they were saved.

## Root Cause
The public-facing ERD view ID was causing the position save/load logic to malfunction.

## Fix
Fixed the position persistence logic to properly handle the public-facing ERD view ID. Deployed to both dev and production.
acceptance_criteria: Saved node positions persist when navigating away and returning
Position save works correctly with public-facing ERD view IDs
Positions load correctly on page reload
ux_changes: ERD node positions now correctly persist across navigation and page reloads.
middleware_changes: Fixed position save/load logic to properly handle public-facing ERD view IDs.
implementation_notes: The bug was introduced when the public-facing ERD view ID feature was added. The position save logic was using an inconsistent ID reference.
comment_summary: Developer identified the bug was caused by the public-facing ERD view ID and fixed it on both dev and production.
